changelog:
📢 1.0.0-beta2: Fixed some issues from our first app release

[🟢=New Feature, 🟠=Feature Update, 🟣=Fix]

Here are some improvements from the last version of Deskplay:

🟣 Fix: Fixed touch mapper WASD and arrows for some games.
🟣 Fix: Fixed segmentation fault on app exit.
🟣 Fix: Fixed broken gameplay for some Android devices like Samsung.
🟣 Fix: Fixed update checker.

I hope you enjoy Deskplay. Keep gaming.
